name:
Beach by ocean, a cliff towers over
west end
description:
I'm in a Beach by ocean, a cliff towers over
west end
hints: Western beach with a towering cliff. Only exit is east.
The cliff is too steep to climb normally.
Look for alternative ways up - maybe from inside the volcano.
E=main beach (1). Can reach this from room 32 by jumping down.
notes: Western beach with cliff. E=main beach (1). Can be reached from cliff (32) by jumping.
